intro_text: The apprentices head out into the territory, following p_l a little dubiously. Gathering things can't possibly be as hard as hunting them - plants don't run away!
decline_text: They're called back to camp, needed for other chores.

success_outcomes.text: It's a long, weird, hard day. Yes, they find cobwebs. Yes, they bring them back to camp - but by StarClan, none of the warrior apprentices were expecting something as simple as cobweb gathering to be so hard, not when it feels like they run into one every other hunt! They definitely end up with a new appreciation for p_l's skills.

log.cats_from: from_cat gained a greater respect for to_cat's skills and role as a medicine cat apprentice while gathering cobwebs.

success_outcomes.text: However, once out of camp, the warrior apprentices realize they're out of their depth and turn to p_l for help. p_l is gracious about it, not making anyone feel like a mouse-brain, and by the time the patrol returns with a successful haul, there's a new feeling of rapport between everyone, regardless of their role.

intro_text: It's been one of the worst storms of the season, leaving p_l in an unavoidably grumpy mood. Herbs strewn about, prey in hiding, it's going to take forever to find anything. r_c attempts to find a way to cheer up the healer.
decline_text: Before r_c can come up with a plan, a cry from the camp forces p_l to return in a hurry.

success_outcomes.text: r_c splashes water from a puddle onto p_l's fur. p_l's fur spikes up like a pinecone, and {PRONOUN/p_l/subject} {VERB/p_l/turn/turns} around to quickly send a wave of water back towards r_c! The two engage in a small water fight, and when they resume the herb patrol, r_c is glad to see p_l looks much happier.

success_outcomes.text: Nothing comes to mind, no magical way to make the herb gathering patrol easier. But little does r_c know, the consideration and determination {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} {VERB/r_c/show/shows} in {PRONOUN/r_c/poss} diligent work makes all the difference to p_l.
